query: SELECT ap.id, ap.trilhaId, t.name, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status FROM assessment_pdi ap LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id WHERE ap.alunoId = 30070;
